title: ORA Annotations
description: Configuration for resolving and rendering text annotations in ORA text views.

definitions.description: Maps annotation type names, for example TEI element names or derived annotation keys, to render definitions.

unknownAnnotation.description: Strategy used when an annotation type has no matching definition.

invalidRange.description: Strategy used when an annotation range is invalid or outside the rendered text.

annotationDefinition.description: Render definition for one annotation type.

definitionBase.description: Common styling and ordering options shared by all annotation definitions.

priority.description: Ordering hint for nested annotations. Lower values are rendered further outside than higher values.

classes.description: CSS utility classes added to the rendered annotation element.

tokens.description: Rules that map whitespace-separated annotation property values to CSS classes.

inlineDefinition.description: Definition for annotations rendered inside the text flow.

layer.description: Declares this definition as an inline annotation.

behavior.description: Rendering behavior for this inline annotation.

renderAs.description: HTML element used to render the inline annotation.

priority.description: Ordering hint for nested inline annotations. Lower values wrap outside higher values.

classes.description: CSS utility classes added to the inline annotation element.

tokens.description: Rules that map annotation property tokens to CSS classes.

dialog.description: Dialog content configuration used when behavior is set to dialog.

structureDefinition.description: Definition for annotations rendered as structural block elements.

layer.description: Declares this definition as a structural annotation.

behavior.description: Rendering behavior for this structural annotation.

renderAs.description: HTML element used to render the structural annotation.

priority.description: Ordering hint for nested structural annotations. Lower values wrap outside higher values.

classes.description: CSS utility classes added to the structural annotation element.

tokens.description: Rules that map annotation property tokens to CSS classes.

layoutDefinition.description: Definition for layout annotations such as lists, list items, tables, rows, and cells.

layer.description: Declares this definition as a layout annotation.

behavior.description: Rendering behavior for this layout annotation.

layoutRole.description: Semantic layout role used by the text view renderer.

renderAs.description: HTML element used to render the layout annotation.

priority.description: Ordering hint for nested layout annotations. Lower values wrap outside higher values.

classes.description: CSS utility classes added to the layout annotation element.

tokens.description: Rules that map annotation property tokens to CSS classes.

zeroPointDefinition.description: Definition for zero-width annotations inserted at a single text position, such as line breaks, page markers, or gaps.

layer.description: Declares this definition as a zero-point annotation.

behavior.description: Rendering behavior for this zero-point annotation.

placement.description: Placement of the visible marker, either in the text flow or in the margin.

classes.description: CSS utility classes added to the rendered zero-point marker.

tokens.description: Rules that map annotation property tokens to CSS classes.

label.description: Bindings whose resolved values are joined to form the visible zero-point marker label.

annotationTokenMapping.description: Maps tokens from one annotation property to CSS classes.

property.description: Annotation source property containing whitespace-separated tokens.

mappings.description: Maps token values to CSS utility classes.

annotationDialog.description: Configuration for information shown when an inline annotation is opened.

title.description: Static title or translation key shown as the dialog title.

description.description: Values shown as dialog description text. Each value is resolved by the backend view endpoint relative to the annotation node.

externalLink.description: Binding resolving to an external URL shown as an action.

references.description: Referenced nodes shown as navigation actions in the dialog.

annotationValue.description: Binding for a display value used by annotation labels or dialogs.

path.description: RAMEN access path resolved by the backend view endpoint relative to the annotation node.

display.description: Optional display template. The placeholder {{ value }} is replaced with the resolved value.

valueMap.description: Optional map replacing resolved raw values with display values before rendering.

annotations.description: Optional binding resolving to annotations applied to this description value.

binding.description: Binding resolved by the backend view endpoint.

path.description: RAMEN access path resolved by the backend view endpoint.

valueMap.description: Optional map replacing resolved raw values with display values before rendering.

annotationReference.description: Reference action shown in an annotation dialog.

label.description: Binding resolving to the visible reference label.

uuid.description: Binding resolving to the referenced node UUID.

icon.description: Optional icon class shown with the reference action, for example a PrimeIcons class.

inlineBehavior.description: Inline annotation behavior. mark renders the annotation in-place; dialog opens annotation details; hidden suppresses rendering.

structureBehavior.description: Structural annotation behavior. mark renders the structure; hidden suppresses rendering.

layoutBehavior.description: Layout annotation behavior. mark renders the layout element; hidden suppresses rendering.

zeroPointBehavior.description: Zero-point annotation behavior. line-break inserts a line break; marker renders a visible marker; hidden suppresses rendering.

inlineRenderElement.description: Allowed HTML elements for inline annotations.

structureRenderElement.description: Allowed HTML elements for structural annotations.

layoutRenderElement.description: Allowed HTML elements for layout annotations.

layoutRole.description: Semantic layout role used to group and render layout annotations.

unknownAnnotationStrategy.description: Strategy for annotation types without a matching definition. ignore drops them; plain renders unstyled text; warn renders with warning semantics.

invalidRangeStrategy.description: Strategy for invalid annotation ranges. ignore drops them; clamp adjusts them to valid bounds; warn keeps warning semantics.
